brief: Trump overturns DHS halt to ICE traffic stops amid fatal shootings; Buzz Aldrin's pen sells for $850k; new research explores multimodal emotion detection and graph database visualization.
news_summary: The White House overturned a DHS halt on ICE traffic stops after two fatal shootings, drawing criticism. Meanwhile, wildfires spread smoke across the Northeast, and Buzz Aldrin's mission-saving pen sold for over $850,000.
papers_summary: New papers introduce CD-MED for cross-domain multimodal emotion detection in digital objects, GraphPolaris for graph database visualization, and Aïra for interdisciplinary AI research assistants.

en.brief: Trump overturns DHS halt to ICE traffic stops amid fatal shootings; Buzz Aldrin's pen sells for $850k; new research explores multimodal emotion detection and graph database visualization.
en.news_summary: The White House overturned a DHS halt on ICE traffic stops after two fatal shootings, drawing criticism. Meanwhile, wildfires spread smoke across the Northeast, and Buzz Aldrin's mission-saving pen sold for over $850,000.
en.papers_summary: New papers introduce CD-MED for cross-domain multimodal emotion detection in digital objects, GraphPolaris for graph database visualization, and Aïra for interdisciplinary AI research assistants.

zh.brief: 今日中国新闻聚焦经济增速放缓至4.3%、间谍案拘留地震学家、香港书店被捕事件引发大陆读者回忆，同时霸王龙化石创下拍卖纪录。论文方面，AI与可视化研究成为热点。
zh.news_summary: 中国二季度GDP增速放缓至4.3%，创2022年底以来新低；地震学家陈友麟因涉嫌间谍罪被拘留近两年；香港独立书店负责人被捕引发大陆读者集体回忆；霸王龙化石以5010万美元成交。
zh.papers_summary: arXiv论文涵盖多模态情感描述、图数据库可视化、AI研究助手及低资源语言健康 misinformation 检测等方向。

todays_image.caption: Both the wrecked train and the pressure to resume traffic stops evoke the disastrous consequences of unchecked momentum and reckless authority.
todays_image.title: Photograph of post card of wrecked train near Beitner, Michigan
